assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with gcloud describe command for versions, kubectl get nodes for health, and kubectl get pods for status verification

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Section 1.1 includes 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR.validVersions)"' command to check available versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Section 1.2 includes kubectl command to check deprecated APIs: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated'

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.29 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: Section 3.1 provides exact command: 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.29'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Section 3.2 includes verification commands and clearly states expected output: 'Control plane at 1.29.x, all system pods Running'

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for each node pool upgrade to 1.29
assertions.reason: Sections 3.3 and 3.4 provide exact commands for both node pools: 'gcloud container node-pools upgrade default-pool --cluster CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --cluster-version 1.29' and same for workload-pool

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Multiple sections include 'watch kubectl get nodes -o wide -L cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool' commands to monitor upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Repeats the full sequence for 1.29→1.30 (sequential, not skipping)
assertions.reason: Phase 4 completely repeats the upgrade sequence for 1.30: control plane upgrade, verification, then both node pool upgrades in separate steps

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 5 includes comprehensive validation with commands to check versions, node status, pod health, and kube-system pods verification

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes detailed troubleshooting section with emergency rollback procedures, including creating new node pools and deleting problematic ones
